"https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/8167879-L.jpg" } ] }; function CategoryBooks() { const { name } = useParams(); const books = data[name] || []; return (

{name}

{books.map((b, i) => (

{b.title}

{b.author}

))}
); } export default CategoryBooks;
